title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Navkar Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Navkar Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Fleet Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!
